taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Machine Learning, Machine Learning Engineer
core_skills: Machine Learning, Computer Vision, Python, PyTorch, JAX
skill_match_scores: Machine Learning:1.0, Computer Vision:0.0, Python:1.0, PyTorch:0.0, JAX:0.0
must_have_quals: Bachelors in Computer Science or a similar discipline, or an equivalent amount of deep learning experience, 3+ years experience in Machine Learning and/or Computer Vision, Experience with Python, Experience with ML frameworks like PyTorch or JAX
preferred_quals: MS or PhD Degree in Machine Learning, Robotics, Computer Science or a similar discipline, Publications at top-tier conferences like CVPR, ICCV, ECCV, ICLR, ICML, ICRA, IROS, RSS, NeurIPS, AAAI, IJCV, PAMI, Experience with C++
core_responsibilities: Create foundation scale data sets and training recipes, develop methods and recipes for human and machine labeling of foundation scale data sets, Create methods and recipes for continuous data intake, selection and incremental updates of large models, develop methods for data mining and recipes for automated data collection/model update flywheels, Develop methods and recipes for evaluating real-world performance of models, and detecting regressions in model updates, Develop and maintain ground-truth free performance metrics
job_summary: Waymo is an autonomous driving technology company with a mission to be the world's most trusted driver. They are seeking a Machine Learning Engineer to develop methods for data mining, create training recipes, and evaluate real-world performance of models in the context of autonomous driving systems.
